parameters.query:
UPDATE planner_sessions SET last_used_at = NOW() WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW();
SELECT s.user_id FROM planner_sessions s WHERE s.token = $1 AND s.expires_at > NOW();

WITH upserted AS (INSERT INTO planner_session_meta (user_id, session_id, name, sort_order) SELECT $2::integer, $3::varchar, $4::text, COALESCE($5::integer, 0) WHERE $1 = 'upsert' AND COALESCE($3, '') != '' ON CONFLICT (user_id, session_id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, sort_order = EXCLUDED.sort_order, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING 1), deleted AS (DELETE FROM planner_session_meta WHERE $1 = 'delete' AND user_id = $2::integer AND session_id = $3::varchar RETURNING 1) SELECT session_id, name, sort_order FROM planner_session_meta WHERE user_id = $2::integer AND ($1 = 'list' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upserted) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deleted)) ORDER BY sort_order, created_at
